schedule: Post 1  — Day -7 — edition_tease       — LK + FB + IG  (7 days before launch)
Post 2  — Day -5 — cover_reveal        — LK + FB + IG  (5 days before launch)
Post 3  — Day -3 — table_of_contents   — LK + IG       (3 days before launch)
Post 4  — Day 0  — article_spotlight_1 — LK + FB + IG  (launch day)
Post 5  — Day 2  — article_spotlight_2 — LK + FB + IG
Post 7  — Day 6  — article_quote_1     — LK + FB + IG
Post 9  — Day 10 — behind_the_scenes   — LK + FB + IG
Post 10 — Day 0  — launch_announcement — LK + FB + IG  (launch day, different slot)
Post 11 — Day 14 — mid_month_reminder  — LK + FB + IG
Post 12 — Day 25 — last_call           — LK + FB + IG
_info.note: publish_date = the edition launch date. Pre-launch posts (Day -7, -5, -3) fire automatically before that date.

title: Magazine Edition Title — e.g. Publixion Vol. 1 Issue 3

posts._note: 7 days before launch. Tease what is coming. Build anticipation. Do not reveal the cover yet.
posts.linkedin:
WRITE LINKEDIN POST HERE. Build excitement without showing everything.

#Publixion #Magazine #ComingSoon
posts.instagram:
WRITE INSTAGRAM CAPTION HERE.

Link in bio.

#Publixion #Magazine #ComingSoon

posts._note: 5 days before launch. Reveal the cover. Show the edition name, theme, key topics.
posts.linkedin:
WRITE LINKEDIN POST HERE. Reveal the cover. Announce the theme.

#Publixion #Magazine
posts.instagram: WRITE INSTAGRAM CAPTION HERE. Use carousel_images for a multi-image reveal.

posts._note: 3 days before launch. Show what is inside. LinkedIn + Instagram only.
posts.linkedin: WRITE LINKEDIN POST HERE. Walk through the table of contents. Make every section sound essential.
posts.instagram: WRITE INSTAGRAM CAPTION HERE. Use carousel to show TOC visually.

posts._note: Launch day. Spotlight the first featured article. Pull the best insight from it.
posts.linkedin: WRITE LINKEDIN POST HERE. Spotlight Article 1 — title, key insight, why it matters.

posts._note: Day 2. Spotlight the second featured article.
posts.linkedin: WRITE LINKEDIN POST HERE. Spotlight Article 2.

posts._note: Day 4. Spotlight the third featured article. LinkedIn + Facebook only.
posts.linkedin: WRITE LINKEDIN POST HERE. Spotlight Article 3.

posts._note: Day 6. Pull a powerful quote or stat from one article. Short and punchy.
posts.linkedin: WRITE LINKEDIN POST HERE. Single quote or stat. Let it breathe.

posts._note: Day 8. Second quote pull. Facebook + Instagram only.
Day 10. How this edition was created. Writers, research, editorial process. Builds brand depth.
posts.linkedin: WRITE LINKEDIN POST HERE. Show the work behind the edition.

posts._note: Launch day (same day as article_spotlight_1 but different time slot). Direct CTA. Link front and centre.
posts.linkedin: WRITE LINKEDIN POST HERE. Direct announcement. This edition is live. Here is where to get it.
posts.instagram: WRITE INSTAGRAM CAPTION HERE. Link in bio.

posts._note: Day 14. Simple reminder. Still available. Show what they are missing.
posts.linkedin: WRITE LINKEDIN POST HERE. Mid-month nudge.

posts._note: Day 25. Final push. This edition closes soon or next edition is coming. Create finality.
posts.linkedin: WRITE LINKEDIN POST HERE. Last call. Make it feel final.
